overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a cowboy character walking through a rainy nighttime street in a historic New Orleans-style city. The character moves from a covered sidewalk onto cobblestone streets with tram tracks, then enters the Galerie Laurent building and explores an interior courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with benches and cast iron fixtures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk next to a brick building, passing wooden benches

notable_agents.action: sitting on a wooden bench against the building wall, observing the street

entered.detail: wooden awning extending over the sidewalk providing shelter from rain
red brick facade with large windows and white trim
simple wooden slatted bench on the sidewalk
black ornate cast iron trash receptacle
cast iron gas-style lamp post illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-slicked covered sidewalk next to a historic brick building. A single NPC sits on a wooden bench to the right, while cast iron street lamps and trash cans line the path. The awning provides shelter from the light rain as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic cobblestone street with tram tracks and gas lighting

events.description: steps off the covered sidewalk onto the open cobblestone street exposed to rain
continues walking straight down the center of the street passing wooden wagons parked on the side

agents.ego_description: walking down the center of the cobblestone street between rows of historic two-story buildings with balconies

entered.detail: wet cobblestone road surface reflecting the street lamps
metal tram rails embedded in the cobblestone street
row of two-story brick buildings with wrought iron balconies and lit windows
continuous facade of historic commercial buildings with awnings
old-fashioned wooden freight wagon parked on the street side

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the sheltered sidewalk into the open cobblestone street, now fully exposed to the light rain. The street features embedded tram tracks and is lined with historic brick buildings featuring wrought iron balconies and warm gas lighting. Wooden wagons are parked along the sides as the character walks down the center of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching commercial building entrance with signage

events.description: enters the Galerie Laurent building through blue shuttered doors

agents.ego_description: approaching the entrance of Galerie Laurent and walking through the doorway into the building

entered.detail: two-story building with sign reading 'GALERIE LAURENT' above the entrance
large blue wooden shuttered doors serving as the main entrance
black and white checkered marble floor visible inside the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the entrance to Galerie Laurent, a historic building with blue shuttered doors and prominent signage. After walking along the cobblestone street, the character enters through the doorway, transitioning from the outdoor rain to the interior corridor with distinctive checkered flooring.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior art gallery corridor leading to private courtyard with fountain

events.description: exits the narrow corridor into the open interior courtyard with a central fountain
stops walking and pans the camera to observe the courtyard surroundings

agents.ego_description: walking through the interior corridor into the courtyard, then pausing to look around at the architecture and fountain

entered.detail: enclosed outdoor courtyard surrounded by two-story building walls
decorative stone fountain with statue in the center of the courtyard
series of arched openings along the ground floor of the building
green and white striped canvas awning over a doorway
large potted plants with red flowers near the entrance
wooden slatted bench under the awning

segments.scene_description: Inside the building, the character moves through a narrow corridor with checkered flooring and emerges into a sheltered interior courtyard. The space features a central stone fountain, arched walkways, potted plants, and striped awnings. The character pauses to observe the quiet courtyard, which is protected from the rain but open to the night sky above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked city sidewalk into the sheltered sanctuary of a historic interior courtyard. It begins under the shelter of a covered awning beside a brick building, passing a lone figure on a wooden bench and cast iron street lamps. As the character moves forward, the camera leaves the sidewalk to enter the open cobblestone street, where the environment opens up to reveal tram tracks, parked wooden wagons, and buildings with wrought iron balconies under a light rain. The scene then shifts as the character approaches the blue shuttered doors of Galerie Laurent, transitioning from the wet outdoor road into a narrow interior corridor with distinctive checkered flooring. Finally, the movement leads out of the corridor and into a quiet courtyard featuring a central stone fountain and arched walkways, protected from the rain but open to the night sky.
